title: T3-B heavy attack tank

The '''T3-B heavy attack tank''' was a heavier complement to its predecessor, the [[T1-B hovertank|T1-B]]. The T3-B was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
The T3-B's ordnance consisted of long-range [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton missiles]] and heavy [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]], making the tank relatively strong against larger targets.

==History==
The T3-B was a tracked tank manufactured by [[Yutrane-Trackata/Legends|Yutrane-Trackata]], and was one of the first vehicles fielded by the Rebellion capable of defeating [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] in open combat.

Yutrane-Trackata later designed the [[T4-B heavy tank]], an upgraded form of the older T3-B. Though the new T4-B was very powerful and effective during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], its implementation did not completely surpass the T3-B, and both tanks were put to great use by the [[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]] and their other ground forces during the war.

T3-B tanks were later used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]].<ref name="GB:CC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The T3-B heavy attack tank was incorrectly described as a 'heavy [[Hovertank|hover tank']] in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.
